positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist illustration of a whimsical celestial scene. The main subject is a stylized crescent moon composed of scattered, bioluminescent star clusters, intertwined with elegant, flowing nebulae ribbons in shades of deep indigo, lavender, and electric cyan. Include several stylized, geometric planets in various sizes and orbits, casting soft, glowing halos. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Style: Vector art meets Art Nouveau linework, with sharp, clean silhouettes and strong contrast. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the central stellar source, creating clear, distinct edges suitable for screen printing or embroidery. Color Direction: Limited, rich jewel tones with high contrast between dark background and glowing foreground elements. Focus on clean lines and simple, bold shapes.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, photorealistic, messy, gradient shading, 3d render
